title: hibiscus physaloides var. genuinus
intro: Hibiscus physaloides var. genuinus, a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, is commonly known as the 'Coral Hibiscus' due to its vibrant coral-colored flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hibiscus physaloides var. genuinus include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
